name: chr3_3p21_GNAT1_cluster
description: 3p21.31 SD-rich block in the GNAT1-GNAI2 cluster, flanked by chemokine receptor genes (CCR1-9) and the AMT/NICN1 paralog region. Small flanking SDs contribute to rare interstitial deletions in 3p21.

architecture.internal_structure: Tandem array of G-protein alpha (GNAT1, GNAT2, GNAI2) and CCR1-9 chemokine receptor paralogs at 60-95% identity; flanking SDs of 10-30 kb.
